arts.ttl: Éric Junior Dina Ebimbe’s move to AS Monaco cancelled
arts.sum: AS Monaco have been in the market for midfield reinforcements this January. Multiple profiles have been considered, including West Ham United’s Edson Alvarez, however, the Principality club had opted to…

arts.ttl: Roma Reignite Pursuit of Talismanic Georgian Forward
arts.sum: Roma have laid eyes on Georges Mikautadze amid their search for new weapons but Olympique Lyonnais, despite their financial crunch, have set a very robust price tag for him, €30M. He has registered 8 goals and assisted once in 27 matches. The post Roma Reignite Pursuit of Talismanic Georgian Forward appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Roma set asking price for Marseille target Nicola Zalewski
arts.sum: According to a report from RMC Sport, Olympique de Marseille are very interested in recruiting Nicola Zalewski (23) from AS Roma this winter. However, the writer Fabrice Hawkins outlines that…
